titleStmt.title: SII 38.487: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 487. (A.R. No. 487 of 1912.) TIRUTTUṞAIPPŪṆḌI, TIRUTTURAIPPUNDI TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. On the main gōpura, Marundīśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Dēvarāya Year: Śaka 1392, Vikṛiti, Siṁha, śu. di 13 Thursday, Magha = 1470, January 13 but the day was Monday.

summary.p: This inscription begins and ends with the imprecatory verses. It contains a royal order issued by the ruler chatuṟsamuttiṛādi-pati Śrī-Vīrapratāpadēvarāya mahārāyar to the temple authorities, Ādisaṇḍēśvara-dēvakaṉmigaḷ of Tiruttuṟai-nāyaṉār temple at Vaṇḍāḻaivēḷūr-kūṟṟam in Rājēndrachōḻa-vaḷanāḍu, conveying the exemption of taxes such as śūlavari, nāṭṭukkāṇikkai, koṟṟilakkai, ēṟṟuvarisai, iḷavarisai, and several others, as sarvamānya, infavour of the temple. It is also stated that this exemption deed was engraved both in stone and copper.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu dānapālanayoḥ ssāmye dānāt
śreyona pālanam dānātrsvaga māvapnoti pāla
nādacya(ra)tam padam svastiśrī manmahāmaṇḍaliśvaran Ari
yarāya vipāṭaṉ pāṣaikkuttappuvarāyar kaṇṭaṉ mu
varāyar kaṇṭaṉ kaṇṭanāṭukoṇṭu koṇṭanāṭu koṭātāṉ catuṟcamuttiṟātipati śrī
virappiratāpa tevarāya makarāyar piṟutuviirācciyam paṇṇiyaruḷā niṉṟa śakāttam
1000 3 100 9 10 2- ṉ mel cellā niṉṟa vikiṟutaRead vikiṟutivaruṣam ciṅkanāyaṟṟu puṟuvaRead pūṟuva pakṣattu trayo
daśiyum śaubhāgyamum peṟṟa viṟukaṟpati vārattu makanāḷmakanāḷ is written below in small form. Irācentiracoḻavaḷanāṭṭu vaṇṭāḻai
ṟa ttu Uṭaiyār tiruttuṟai nāyaṉār koyil Āticaṇṭecura devakaṉmikaḷukku
paḷḷikoṇṭaperumāḷ piṟatāpa tevarāya maḻavarāyar caṟuvamāṉiya pattiṟam paṇṇik
kuṭuttapaṭi Iṉnāyaṉār koyilpaṟṟukku Iṟaitaram Ākak koṇṭu varum cūlavari
nāṭṭukkāṇikkai koṟṟilakkai Ēṟṟu varicai Iḷavaricait tuṇṭam Iṟai
Ilāpam kālvari cakuruttu vāci paḻavari putuvari puṟavari koḻuntu kāṇikkai cūṭupāṭi
kāval kuḷavaṭai cāraṭai miṉāyam Āyam Aracu niyatti Aracukuṟṟam Araca viceṣam
kallaṇai kāṭuveṭṭu Ōlaieḻuttu vattaṉai Avataravattaṉai kkaravattaṉai
paṟṟaṭai cāttaravakaiyum Intakkuṭiyil koḷḷum puṟavari putuvariyum cāti
vari Iṉavari veṭṭivari pulvari kaṇṭeṟṟam maṟṟum Intak koyil cirmaikku
cuṭṭum pala Upātiyam Uṭpaṭṭa mutalaṭaṅka nāḷatu mutal cantiṟātittavarai
yum cella caṟuvamāṉiyam Ākakkoḷḷak kaṭavarkaḷ Ākavum tiruttuṟaippūṇṭi
Iṉṉāyaṉār koyilpaṟṟu caṟuvamāṉiya pattiṟam kallilum cempilum veṭṭi
koḷḷakkaṭavarkaḷ Ākavum sudattām paradattām vā yohareti vasuṇḍarāḥ .
ṣaṣṭhim varṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyā jāyatekramiḥ Inta taṉmattukku Akitam paṇ
ṇiṉavarkaḷ keṅkaikkaraiyil brahmahattiyum kovataiyum paṇṇiṉa pā
vattile pokak kaṭavarkaḷākavum .§
Digital edition of SII 38.487 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
